markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Positron.ai and GrowthX for content strategy and AI-driven growth.](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy and execution sprint ($20K) to develop content strategy, company positioning, and AI-optimized visibility](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Positron.ai seeks to establish brand presence and thought leadership in silicon/semiconductor space ahead of major product launch in 12-15 months](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [GrowthX's platform combines AI workflows, expert editors, and execution teams to create high-quality, context-aware content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Focus on creating "air coverage" and building trust through high-quality resources, balancing general industry content with company-specific insights](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Engine and AI-Driven Growth Strategy

  - [Combines content strategy, AI workflows, expert editors, and execution teams](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Platform features context engineering, research automation, and AI-optimized content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Aims to increase organic traffic and AI visibility (1000X+ growth cited for a client)](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Focuses on making brands appear in AI answers accurately and contextually](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Typical engagement: 8-week strategy and execution sprint ($20K) to develop artifacts, strategy, and quality benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

### Positron.ai's Growth Challenges and Objectives

  - [Currently spending $10K/month on PR agency (Bonfire) for articles and fundraising support](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Aims to establish brand presence in silicon/semiconductor space ahead of major product launch (12-15 months timeline)](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Wants to be part of the "psyche of AIs and Internet" to build credibility and recognition](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Challenges: long product development cycles, balancing thought leadership with protecting IP/trade secrets](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Key messaging areas: performance per watt, environmental implications of efficient silicon](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Initial focus on creating company context, profiles, and baseline content](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Explore thought leadership approach with lower volume, high-quality content (similar to Surge AI engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Potential for investor-focused content creation (one-pagers, memos, market analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Balance between general industry content and Positron-specific insights, respecting IP sensitivity](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)

### GrowthX's Platform and Process Demonstration

  - [Showed context engineering tools, research automation workflows, and content creation interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Highlighted integration with various AI research tools (Tably, Exa AI, Parallel, Perplexity, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Demonstrated how content is optimized for AI answers and organic search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send meeting recording to Mitesh](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [GrowthX team (Marcel and Tyler) to internally discuss and prepare a tailored package/proposal for Positron.ai](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Mitesh to create a shared Slack channel and invite Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [GrowthX to send follow-up proposal by the next day](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Potential future discussion on fundraising insights (Mitesh to share expertise with Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/mFiFh3kLLsbWhYjsbHsjcx3YTzez3XSV?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
